# Copilot Instructions

Before implementing or reviewing code in this repository, read:

1. `AGENTS.md`
2. `docs/AI_CODING_AGENTS.md`
3. `.cursor/rules/karpathy-guidelines.mdc`
4. `docs/ENGINEERING_RULES.md`
5. `docs/NAMING_CONVENTIONS.md`
6. The nearest folder `README.md`

When changing Next.js routing, App Router files, metadata, caching, layouts, server components, or
route handlers, also read the relevant installed guide in `node_modules/next/dist/docs/`.

Follow the project rules for TypeScript, ESLint, React hooks, SCSS modules, testing, verification,
and small scoped changes.
